emails.subject: Discrepancies -
emails.body: Discrepancies Traded 11-13-00 Chris mallory deal 457482 and 457481 Prebon shows 50 mw and we show 25 mw on each deal. Can you check with Chris Mallory because when I checked out with Prebon we confirmed the megawatts as 25mw on these deals. Thanks

emails.subject: Discrepancies -
emails.body: Discrepancies Traded 11-13-00 Chris mallory deal 457482 and 457481 Prebon shows 50 mw and we show 25 mw on each deal. Can you check with Chris Mallory because when I checked out with Prebon we confirmed the megawatts as 25mw on these deals. Thanks

emails.subject: Discrepancies -
emails.body: Discrepancies Traded 11-13-00 Chris mallory deal 457482 and 457481 Prebon shows 50 mw and we show 25 mw on each deal. Can you check with Chris Mallory because when I checked out with Prebon we confirmed the megawatts as 25mw on these deals. Thanks

emails.subject: Re: Discrepancies -
emails.body: Re: Discrepancies Disregard my other reply I don't know what I was thinking. Prebon was right on this. Both deals were 50 MW (not 25 MW like I said earlier!), and they were changed accordingly. Sorry about the confusion. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 11/15/2000 01:29 PM
